result: Image generation failed at downloadImage stage — remote browser worker-2 (cdp:9334) could not locate dialog element after image was generated.

error.message: locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded — waiting for locator('[role="dialog"]').last() to be visible
error.detail: Worker worker-2 on CDP port 9334.
